results.title: Secret Trump Administration Battle to Fight Chinese AI

results.title: Smart #5 Gets RM10,000 Price Hike; Brabus Model Gets Laser Red Limited Edition
results.description: Smart Malaysia launched the #5 electric SUV at the tail end of last year. The EV was launched with two variants, the Premium and the Brabus, the latter being the one with higher performance figures as the name suggests. Today, the brand has announced that there’s a Laser Red limited edition paintjob for said Brabus [...] The post Smart #5 Gets RM10,000 Price Hike; Brabus Model Gets Laser Red Limited Edition appeared first on Lowyat.NET .
